sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الطُّلَّابُ الجَمْعَ وَالطَّرْحَ فِي حِصَّةِ الرِّيَاضِيَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su učili sabiranje i oduzimanje na času matematike.
sentences.translationEn: The students learned addition and subtraction in maths class.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ المُعَلِّمُ أَمْثِلَةً كَثِيرَةً عَلَى السَّبُّورَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnik je napisao mnogo primjera na tabli.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher wrote many examples on the board.

sentences.translation: Učenici su rješavali zadatke u sveskama.
sentences.translationEn: The students solved the problems in their notebooks.

sentences.arabic: صَحَّحَ المُعَلِّمُ الإِجَابَاتِ مَعَهُمْ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnik je nakon toga ispravio odgovore s njima.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher corrected the answers with them afterwards.
